literature_gap_log: BR biosynthesis: TaD11, TaDWF1, TaDWF4, TaBRD2 exist but only briefly characterised as sources of brassinolide; specific upstream regulators of TaD11/TaDWF1 in wheat remain uncharacterised and treated as source nodes.
Auxin biosynthesis: TaYUCCA family identified (64 members) but no specific regulator-of-auxin edges curated with full-text evidence; auxin treated as a near-source hormone.
TaSLY1 F-box (wheat ortholog of SLY1/GID2): mechanism inferred from Arabidopsis/rice literature; direct wheat biochemistry limited; node kept with inferred evidence.
Photoperiod PPD-1 and VRN1 feed into the GA biosynthesis axis (VRN1 -> TaGA20ox2 confirmed) but PPD-1 direct target on GA pathway not fully resolved; kept as ENVIRONMENT-associated regulator.
TaTB1 (TEOSINTE BRANCHED 1) listed as height regulator in review but full mechanistic paper for wheat height not available; kept with review-level evidence only.
Rht4, Rht5, Rht26 causative genes not yet cloned; represented at locus level with review-level evidence.

edges.mechanism: GA binds the TaGID1 receptor pocket inducing conformational change that permits DELLA interaction; homeolog-independent.

evidence.title: Molecular Characterization of Rht-1 Dwarfing Genes in Hexaploid Wheat

evidence.title: Molecular characterization of three GIBBERELLIN-INSENSITIVE DWARF1 homologous genes in hexaploid wheat
evidence.authors: Li A, Yang W, Li S, Liu D, Guo X, Sun J, Zhang A
evidence.evidence_sentence: Strong interactions between each putative TaGID1 and the wheat DELLA proteins RHT-A1, RHT-B1, and RHT-D1 in the presence of GA3, and weak interactions in the absence of GA3
evidence.claim: GA3 strengthens TaGID1-DELLA binding in Y2H

edges.mechanism: GA-bound TaGID1 binds DELLA N-terminal DELLA/TVHYNP motif via closed N-terminal lid, recruiting SCF-SLY1 E3 ligase for DELLA degradation.

evidence.title: Molecular Characterization of Rht-1 Dwarfing Genes in Hexaploid Wheat
evidence.authors: Pearce S, Saville R, Vaughan SP, Chandler PM, Wilhelm EP, Sparks CA, Al-Kaff N, Korolev A, Boulton MI, Phillips AL, Hedden P, Nicholson P, Thomas SG
evidence.evidence_sentence: This leads to closing of the N-terminal lid of GID1, allowing DELLAs to bind through their conserved N-terminal DELLA/TVHYNP motifs
evidence.claim: GA-TaGID1 targets Rht-B1 DELLA for degradation

edges.mechanism: GA-bound TaGID1 targets Rht-D1 DELLA homeolog for proteasomal degradation via SCF-SLY1.

evidence.title: TaARF4 genes are linked to root growth and plant height in wheat
evidence.authors: Wang J, Wang R, Mao X, Li L, Chang X, Zhang X, Jing R
evidence.evidence_sentence: TaARF4-A was shown to regulate HB33 expression which negatively responded to ABA, and reduced root length and plant height by repressing expression of Gretchen Hagen 3 (GH3) genes

edges.mechanism: TaHB33 represses TaGH3 expression; TaGH3 conjugates auxin (reducing active auxin).

evidence.title: TaARF4 genes are linked to root growth and plant height in wheat
evidence.authors: Wang J, Wang R, Mao X, Li L, Chang X, Zhang X, Jing R
evidence.evidence_sentence: HB33 expression which negatively responded to ABA, and reduced root length and plant height by repressing expression of Gretchen Hagen 3 (GH3) genes

edges.mechanism: GH3 enzymes conjugate IAA with amino acids, reducing active auxin pool.

evidence.title: TaARF4 genes are linked to root growth and plant height in wheat
evidence.authors: Wang J, Wang R, Mao X, Li L, Chang X, Zhang X, Jing R
evidence.evidence_sentence: repressing expression of Gretchen Hagen 3 (GH3) genes
evidence.claim: GH3 reduces active auxin via conjugation

edges.mechanism: DELLA N-terminus uniquely controls seed dormancy; ovg suppressor alleles enhance dormancy when retaining N-terminal function.

evidence.title: Differential coupling of gibberellin responses by Rht-B1c suppressor alleles and Rht-B1b in wheat highlights a unique role for the DELLA N-terminus in dormancy
evidence.authors: Van De Velde K, Chandler PM, Van Der Straeten D, Rohde A
evidence.evidence_sentence: Semi-dwarf ovg alleles increased dormancy, which correlated with improved pre-harvest sprouting resistance

edges.mechanism: GA-insensitive Rht-B1b/Rht-D1b shorten coleoptile; GA-responsive dwarfs (Rht18/24) do NOT.

evidence.title: Towards the replacement of wheat Green Revolution genes
evidence.authors: Pearce S
evidence.evidence_sentence: no shortening of the coleoptile in plants carrying the Rht18 allele, contrasting sharply with the coleoptile reduction observed in Rht-D1b lines

edges.mechanism: TaZnF-B activates BR signalling; znf loss reduces plant height ~8 cm without yield penalty; znf+rht1 double restores WT height with larger grains.

evidence.title: Reducing brassinosteroid signalling enhances grain yield in semi-dwarf wheat
evidence.authors: Song L, Liu J, Cao B, Liu B, Zhang X, Chen Z, Dong C, Liu X, Zhang Z, Wang W, Chai L, Liu J, Zhu J, Cui S, He F, Peng H, Hu Z, Su Z, Guo W, Xin M, Yao Y, Yan Y, Song Y, Bai G, Sun Q, Ni Z
evidence.evidence_sentence: znf-bb (single): Shorter (8.4 cm); Slight reduction; no pleiotropy

edges.mechanism: Dwarfing DELLA alleles reduce anther length up to 20% (double Rht1+Rht2 combinations).

evidence.title: Green Revolution dwarfing Rht genes negatively affected wheat floral traits related to cross-pollination efficiency
evidence.authors: Schierenbeck M, Alqudah AM, Lantos E, Avogadro EG, Simon MR, Borner A
evidence.evidence_sentence: Decreases up to 20.2% in anther length were documented with the double gene combination

edges.mechanism: TEOSINTE BRANCHED 1 regulates stem internode length; review-level evidence in wheat.

evidence.title: Towards the replacement of wheat Green Revolution genes
evidence.authors: Pearce S
evidence.evidence_sentence: TEOSINTE BRANCHED 1 | Regulates height and stem internode length

edges.mechanism: DELLA sequesters PIF transcription factors to suppress cell-elongation genes; accumulated Rht-B1c constitutively blocks PIFs.

evidence.title: Sequence variations of the partially dominant DELLA gene Rht-B1c in wheat and their functional impacts
evidence.authors: Wen W, Deng Q, Jia H, Wei L, Wei J, Wan H, Yang L, Cao W, Ma Z
evidence.evidence_sentence: The accumulated mutant protein constitutively blocks phytochrome-interacting factor activity, suppressing cell elongation genes

edges.mechanism: PIFs activate cell elongation genes; when sequestered by DELLA, stem elongation decreases.

evidence.title: Sequence variations of the partially dominant DELLA gene Rht-B1c in wheat and their functional impacts
evidence.authors: Wen W, Deng Q, Jia H, Wei L, Wei J, Wan H, Yang L, Cao W, Ma Z
evidence.evidence_sentence: constitutively blocks phytochrome-interacting factor activity, suppressing cell elongation genes

edges.mechanism: Red/far-red light via phytochromes targets PIFs for degradation; low light de-represses elongation.

evidence.title: Sequence variations of the partially dominant DELLA gene Rht-B1c in wheat and their functional impacts
evidence.authors: Wen W, Deng Q, Jia H, Wei L, Wei J, Wan H, Yang L, Cao W, Ma Z
evidence.evidence_sentence: phytochrome-interacting factor activity, suppressing cell elongation genes

edges.mechanism: DELLA physically binds GRF4, inhibiting its growth/N-assimilation output; antagonistic balance.

evidence.title: Modulating plant growth-metabolism coordination for sustainable agriculture
evidence.authors: Li S, Tian Y, Wu K, Ye Y, Yu J, Zhang J, Liu Q, Hu M, Li H, Tong Y, Harberd NP, Fu X
evidence.evidence_sentence: physical interactions of the GROWTH-REGULATING FACTOR 4 (GRF4) transcription factor and the growth inhibitor DELLA confer homeostatic co-regulation
